title: UACP Artifacts Extension
description: Artifact version chain with lineage_id and previous_version_id. v0.3.4.

version.description: Version number for this artifact within the conversation. Monotonically increasing per artifact_lineage_id.

artifact_lineage_id.description: Stable identifier shared across all versions of the same logical artifact.

previous_version_id.description: id of the immediately prior artifact in the lineage. Absent for version 1; required for version > 1.

immutable.description: When true, the artifact's content MUST NOT be edited in place; new versions create new ids.
